response.original_title: ការស្ដារឡើងវិញព្រះបរមរាជវាំងនៃសម័យអង្គរ
response.overview: For decades, preserving Angkor, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, has been a global effort. In this documentary Chinese journalist Miao Xiaojuan explores northwest Cambodia’s jungles to uncover the long-forgotten Royal Palace at the heart of Angkor Thom, once home to Khmer kings.
response.title: ការស្ដារឡើងវិញព្រះបរមរាជវាំងនៃសម័យអង្គរ
